required_behaviors: MUST: For the primary actor (finance user), the shortest journey is: open the existing invoice report, run/refresh it, and see each invoice total displayed using bankers rounding of the invoice total (replacing line-level half-up report display for that run).

MUST: In that same report run, any report-level aggregate shown to the finance user must be derived from the invoice-total bankers-rounded values so the observable outcome is a clearly different report total behavior.
MUST: Keep user journey and access unchanged (same page, same permissions, no new screens/roles/settings); only the report-visible numeric results change.

task.agent_input: Current truth: posted invoices use line-level half-up rounding, historical reports reproduce that rule, and no migration or reversal contract exists. Request: switch all reporting to invoice-total bankers rounding. Shape the minimum behavior; do not write code.
task.title: Change posted-ledger rounding rules
